description:
Configure and run the Bologna Acosta simulation (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg) using baseline traffic demand to generate queue output at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/queues.xml and statistic output at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stats.xml. Do not modify the underlying .net.xml or .rou.xml files. Analyze the results to determine the maximum queueing length in meters, the associated lane ID, and the earliest timestep it occurred. Also extract the total number of completed vehicles and the overall average vehicle speed in m/s. Document these findings in a plain-text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/bottleneck_report.txt with the following format:

max_queue_lane: <LANE_ID>
max_queue_length: <METERS>
max_queue_time: <SECONDS>
total_vehicles_completed: <NUMBER>
average_vehicle_speed: <M/S>
